description: Validates that loop variables correctly shadow system built-in functions, and that non-fatal warnings are correctly reported on a successful compilation.

diagnostics.messageContains: Elements with 'p-for' directives should have a unique 'p-key' binding for efficient updates
Loop variable 'len' shadows a global built-in function

assertNodes.description: Valid call to len() on a slice should resolve to int.
A loop variable named 'len' should shadow the built-in and resolve to the type of the iterated item (string).
